parts.text: Design a clean, modern, minimalist wordmark logo for a SaaS company called 'sitetospend'. The logo text should read 'sitetospend' in a single line. Use a clean sans-serif font. The word 'site' should be in dark charcoal gray (#374151), 'to' in medium gray (#9CA3AF), and 'spend' in bold burnt orange (#E8590C). White/transparent background. No icons, no imagery, just clean professional typography suitable for a web application header.
